get_ndx_pe_and_earnings_yield.notes: Optional high-trust manual valuation input. Leave inactive/blank to use live sources.

get_equity_risk_premium.name: NDX Simple Yield Gap (Manual)

get_equity_risk_premium.notes: Optional manual simple yield gap input. This is not Damodaran-style implied ERP.

get_damodaran_us_implied_erp.name: Manual/Wind ERP Reference

value.scope: manual/Wind ERP reference; specify US market, NDX, or other scope when used
value.not_ndx_valuation_warning: Manual ERP reference is not NDX PE/Forward PE/PB historical percentile.

data_quality.formula: User-supplied manual ERP/reference risk premium; not NDX simple yield gap unless explicitly calculated that way

coverage.note: Manual ERP scope must be supplied or reviewed by user.

get_damodaran_us_implied_erp.notes: Optional manual ERP reference; not NDX simple yield gap and not a substitute for NDX PE/Forward PE/PB percentile.
